uplink.description: POSITION_MESSAGE with a GPS fix (STATIC): on-device latitude/longitude, temperature, battery level, horizontal accuracy
uplink._note: Input is the upstream asset-tracker-2-codec.yaml GPS_FIX example (Apache-2.0); expected.data authored here and cross-checked by running reference/upstream-codec.js (gpsLatitude 48.9208064, gpsLongitude 2.3082752, horizontalAccuracy 7.84, temperatureMeasure 25.3, batteryLevel 193, dynamicMotionState STATIC).

uplink.description: POSITION_MESSAGE with a GPS fix (MOVING): synthetic in-bounds lat/lon, moving flag set
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds fix (lat 40.0, lon -74.0066304); byte[1]=0x44 sets PERMANENT_TRACKING + the moving bit. expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this input and normalizing.

uplink.description: POSITION_MESSAGE WiFi BSSID scan: MAC list for cloud solving (no on-device position)
uplink._note: Synthetic WiFi scan (byte[4] low nibble 9 = WIFI_BSSIDS_WITH_NO_CYPHER). Cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (rawPositionType WIFI_BSSIDS_WITH_NO_CYPHER, bssid aa:bb:cc:11:22:33 rssi -64). WiFi scans never yield position.* on-device.

uplink.description: POSITION_MESSAGE BLE beacon scan: MAC list for cloud solving (no on-device position)
uplink._note: Synthetic BLE scan (byte[4] low nibble 7 = BLE_BEACON_SCAN). Cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (bssid 01:02:03:04:05:06 rssi -112). BLE scans never yield position.* on-device.

uplink.description: EVENT message (GEOLOC_START): climate + motion header only, no position
uplink._note: Input is the upstream asset-tracker-2-codec.yaml GEOLOC_START example (Apache-2.0); expected.data authored here and cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (temperatureMeasure 23.8, batteryLevel 249, STAND_BY, STATIC).

uplink.description: GPS position with decoded coordinates out of range -> error

errors: decoded GPS position out of range

uplink._note: byte[6..8] = 0x400000 + '00' shift decodes to ~107.37 deg latitude, outside [-90, 90].

uplink.description: FRAME_PENDING uplink carries no measurement -> error

errors: frame-pending uplink carries no normalized measurement

uplink._note: byte[0]=0 selects the FRAME_PENDING message type.
